guide:
# Level 1

**Quest NPC:** Corious Slaerin  
Speak to Corious Slaerin, the Guildmaster. He asks you to go see **Merchant Gilgash** and buy a **Bone Earring** (free). Merchant Gilgash is located downstairs. Return to Corious.  
**430 XP**

---

# Level 2

**Quest NPC:** Corious Slaerin  
Corious Slaerin sends you to see **Spiritmaster Keika**, who binds you and sends you to **Coachman Ronks** to be signed into his ledger. Return to Corious.  
**2,200 XP**

---

# Level 3

**Quest NPC:** Rathei Slaerin  
Speak to Rathei Slaerin, standing next to Corious. To prove your worth, you must bring Rathei **two damaged dragonfly wings**. Go outside the walls of Freeport and farm fireflies/sparkflies until you obtain 2 wings; return to Rathei.  
**6,900 XP** & **Life Tap** scroll

---

# Level 4

**Quest NPC:** Rathei Slaerin  
To continue your apprenticeship, you must wear the **black robe of the order**. Rathei will enchant a robe for you, but you must gather the following materials:

- **Plain Robe** — Purchase from **Merchant Yulia** (outside the Academy of Science)  
- **Silk Cord** — Purchase from **Merchant Yesam** (first room off the coach in a building of merchants)  
- **Sliver of Snake Meat** — Drops from snakes outside the walls of Freeport; farm until obtained

Return the items to Rathei.  
**17,000 XP** & **Black Robe of the Order**

---

# Level 5

**Quest NPC:** Rathei Slaerin  
Speak to Rathei. The roads are plagued by highwaymen. Hunt them down and return the stolen goods. Exit by the Blacksmith (north), follow the road, then head right to a grassy hill with a druid stone. Kill the highwaymen, loot the stolen goods, and return to Rathei.  
**36,500 XP** & **Rabid Infection** scroll

---

# Level 7

**Quest NPC:** Corious Slaerin  
Speak to Corious. Villagers in Temby report an Elf in town. Travel to Temby and slay the squire **Janxt** (**CONs Yellow @7**). Loot her idol and return to Corious.  
**157,474 XP** & **Strengthen Bone** scroll, **Old Padded Pants**

---

# Level 10

**Quest NPC:** Corious Slaerin  
Corious sends you to **Hodstock** north of Freeport to infiltrate the **Novandear gang**. Kill **Charlik Novandear**.  
**Note:** Follow the riverbank north to a broken bridge. Wait until night in Tunari for Novandear to appear. Weak bandits around the ramps con light blue/blue @lvl 10; other family members con yellow. Kill until Charlik appears.  
Loot his **Warm Heart** and return to Corious.

Purchase **Lantern Oil** from **Merchant Landi** (NE of the bank) for 296 tunar, then return to Crimsonhand.  
**556,753 XP** & **Dagger of Essence**

---

# Level 13

**Quest NPC:** Corious Slaerin  
Deliver a bag of coins to **Agent Wilkenson** at the docks. Take the note from him and deliver it to **Duminven** in **Saerk's Tower**.  
**Note:** Exit north gate, follow road west to **Kithicor Forest**, then to Saerk's Tower. Use Highpass Trade Route or alternate route via pickclaw side past Bastable village.

At Saerk's Tower, deliver the note to Duminven. He instructs you to find the thief **Eliene** in **Bastable**. Follow her, kill her and her contact, then return to Duminven.  
**550,698 XP** & **Ward Death** scroll

---

# Level 15

**Quest NPC:** Corious Slaerin  
Corious sends you to **Weynia**, a tailor south of Freeport on an island near the lighthouse, to craft new leggings. Collect:

1. **Pristine Sidewinder Snake Skin** — Travel west into the hills, slay sidewinders (**CON LB/DB @15**) and collect skin
2. **Pristine Sand Skipper Carapace** — Travel along the beach south, farm sand skippers (**CON LB-DB @15**)
3. **Bundle of Pristine Silk** — Travel far west past the Deathfist camp to the ruins. Kill **Gargantula** (**CON Yellow @15**) to loot silk
4. **Vulture Feathers** — Purchase from **Dteven Savis** for 273 tunar, near Freeport west gate

Return items to Tailor Weynia, then give the **Poacher's Leggings** to Corious.  
**883,791 XP**, **Deathwalker Leggings**, & **Endure Disease** scroll

---

# Level 20

**Quest NPC:** Corious Slaerin  
Corious has discovered the mark you found is a fake. Find the real mark and deliver it to **William Nothard**. Start by speaking to **Wilkenson** at the docks.

**The Troll:** Speak to **Madame Telina** NE of Wilkenson. The mark is held by a Troll named **Roj Eir Sew' Eil** (**CON DB @20**). Travel southwest to locate and kill him. Loot the **Mark of Louoth** and return to Telina.

**The Pirates:** Telina sends you south to **Muniel's Tea Garden**. Use a coach if available. Travel carefully through high-level zones. On an island off the coast (NE of coach), slay skeleton pirates (CON LB-Yellow @20), search sand-covered chests for the **Chiseled Great Axe of Doom**, and return to Telina.

**Waterlogged Treasure Chest:** Telina mentions a valley she saw in a vision. Travel south from FP coach through the desert to a gypsy village. Locate **Razor Back Fang**, climb the fang mountains, and fall into the water to access the obelisk. Loot the **Etched Helmet of Greatness** and return to Telina.

She gives you a note to pass to Corious.  
**Reward:** **2,814,929 XP**  
Choose between:
- **Blood Gale** & **Sickle** — Drains enemy health, restores 125 HP to your group  
- **Power Gale** & **Totem** — Drains enemy power, restores 150 Power to your group
